summary: auth.go: change s.HarvestedAt.Add(15 * 60) to s.HarvestedAt.Add(15 * time.Minute) so freshUntil is a real 15-minute window instead of 900 nanoseconds.
reason: Greptile P1 on PR #588: untyped 15*60 silently coerces to time.Duration(900) = 900ns. JSON freshUntil was essentially equal to harvestedAt.
validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass.
